REPLY TO DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 62446506) FILED BY DEFENDANT VANGUARD PROPERTIES INC.

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION, 501, DEFENDANT VANGUARD PROPERTIES INC'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. ARGUED REGARDING THE ISSUE OF LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO PLAINTIFF COLIN HOOPS, AND THE COURT TAKES THAT ISSUE UNDER SUBMISSION. THE COURT ADOPTS THE REMAINDER OF THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR THE REMAINING PLAINTIFFS TO ALLEGE: (1) FACTS IN SUPPORT OF EACH CAUSE OF ACTION AS TO EACH PLAINTIFF WITH REQUISITE SPECIFICITY AS IS REQUIRED FOR FRAUD-BASED CAUSES OF ACTION; (2) ANY ALLEGATIONS MADE AGAINST VANGUARD IN ITS SEPARATE CAPACITIES (E.G. DEVELOPER, SELLER'S AGENT, BUYER'S AGENT) TO BE CLEARLY AND SEPARATELY MADE; (3) FACTUAL ALLEGATIONS REGARDING DELAYED DISCOVERY BY EACH PLAINTIFF AS TO EACH ALLEGED LATENT DEFECT TO BE CLEARLY MADE. COUNSEL SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER FOR THE COURT'S CONSIDERATION. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT VANGUARD PROPERTIES INC'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. THIS MATTER IS NOT ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOOT. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

Defendants Motion To Strike Portions Of The First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Sep-19-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT VANGUARD PROPERTIES INC'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

Appearances: Mark R. Kirkland of Kasdan Lippsmith Weber Turner LLP (925.906.9220) for plaintiff and responding party; Mark Wilson of Manning & Kass Ellrod Ramirez Trester LLP (415.400.0829) for defendant and moving party.

This matter is not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Moot. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/REQ)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-20-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT VANGUARD PROPERTIES INC'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

Appearances: Mark R. Kirkland of Kasdan Lippsmith Weber Turner LLP (925.906.9220) for plaintiff and responding party; Mark Wilson of Manning & Kass Ellrod Ramirez Trester LLP (415.400.0829) for defendant and moving party.

Argued regarding the issue of leave to amend as to plaintiff Colin Hoops, and the Court takes that issue under submission. The Court adopts the remainder of the tentative ruling as follows: Sustained with leave to amend for the remaining Plaintiffs to allege: (1) facts in support of each cause of action as to each Plaintiff with requisite specificity as is required for fraud-based causes of action; (2) any allegations made against Vanguard in its separate capacities (e.g. developer, seller's agent, buyer's agent) to be clearly and separately made; (3) factual allegations regarding delayed discovery by each Plaintiff as to each alleged latent defect to be clearly made. Counsel submit a proposed form of order for the Court's consideration. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/REQ)
